description_long: This object is a stylized potted cactus with a thick, upright green stem and a single angled arm, reminiscent of a cartoon saguaro. The cactus is topped with a bright purple-pink flower, adding a pop of color to its otherwise simple form. The plant is set in a round, reddish-brown terracotta pot filled with a textured grayish soil. The pot has a smooth, unadorned surface and a slightly flared rim. The cactus itself has a faceted, polygonal appearance, with visible edges and flat surfaces, giving it a low-poly aesthetic. The overall look is playful and decorative, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A stylized green cactus with a purple-pink flower sits in a plain terracotta pot filled with textured soil. The cactus has a polygonal, cartoon-like form with a single angled arm.
description_view_0: The main upright stem and angled arm of the cactus are visible, with the flower partially seen at the tip of the arm. The terracotta pot and soil are clearly shown.
description_view_1: The cactus is viewed head-on, with the purple-pink flower fully visible at the end of the arm, and the pot's round shape is centered.
description_view_2: The angled arm and flower are prominent, extending to the left, while the main stem and pot are seen from a side perspective.
description_view_3: The back of the cactus is visible, showing the faceted green surface and the pot, with the flower just peeking from behind the stem.
